message: ci: rebase docs sync with source preference

files.patch:
@@ -97,7 +97,7 @@ jobs:
           for attempt in 1 2 3 4 5; do
             if git fetch origin main:refs/remotes/origin/main; then
               skip_stale_source
-              if git rebase origin/main && git push origin HEAD:main; then
+              if git rebase -X theirs origin/main && git push origin HEAD:main; then
                 exit 0
               fi
             fi
